name: GCL Personnel Cloud Box
postCreateCommand: cd /tmp && wget https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.24.0-stable.tar.xz && tar -xf flutter_linux_3.24.0-stable.tar.xz && mkdir -p $HOME/development && mv flutter $HOME/development/ && export PATH="$HOME/development/flutter/bin:$PATH" && flutter config --no-analytics && cd ${containerWorkspaceFolder} && $HOME/development/flutter/bin/flutter pub get
